jobs.title: Fullstack Developer
jobs.description: Designed and implemented a SaaS solution for the automotive visualization platform. Implemented a portal and an electron app composed of microfrontends and backed up by serverless infrastructure.

jobs.title: Java Developer
jobs.description: Developed a microservices backend for an e-commerce system. Prototyped self-contained systems in the further scaling of the project. Carried out technical interviews with external developers and product owners for team scaling.

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Provided support for CloudFoundry PaaS and implemented self-service portal.

jobs.title: Master's Thesis
jobs.description: Created a vehicle model using Machine Learning for automated controller parametrization for autonomous driving.

jobs.title: Research Assistant
jobs.description: Enabled Big Data processing of DNA sequences on the LRZ compute cloud by setting up the infrastructure. Published scientific paper: Lagkouvardos, Ilias, et al. "IMNGS: A comprehensive open resource of processed 16S rRNA microbial profiles for ecology and diversity studies."
